actions.expression:
SELECT delivery.ckdh,
       delivery.fphm,
       delivery.Salesman,
       delivery.WarehouseName,
 
     
       delivery.ContainerNo,
       delivery.SealNo,
       delivery.StuffingDate,
       delivery.LoadingSupervi,
       delivery.zjjz,
       delivery.zgfy,
       delivery.jcfy,
       delivery.gbf,
       delivery.yf,
       delivery.qtfy,
       delivery.fyhj,
       delivery.sfkp,
       delivery.zggr,
       delivery.ckfybz,
       delivery.sqlx,
       delivery.fylb,
       delivery.sqdh,
       delivery.zchm,
       delivery.cph,
       delivery.yflx,
       delivery.ywbm,
       delivery.khmc,
       delivery.TotalCartons,
       delivery.TotalVolumn
FROM delivery 
WHERE (delivery.ckdh=[仓库费用.出库单号]) 
  AND permission('出库单') LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cyzglsheet.bz 
FROM cyzgl,cyzglsheet 
WHERE (cyzglsheet.zm="装柜业务") 
  AND (cyzglsheet.xm=[仓库费用.业务员]) LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT deliveryline.sid,
       deliveryline.StorageDate,
       deliveryline.StorageTime,
       deliveryline.ckrq,
       deliveryline.PurchaseOrderNo,
       deliveryline.ItemNo,
       deliveryline.zwmc,
       deliveryline.SupplierShortName,
       deliveryline.InCartonQty,
       deliveryline.CartonQty1,
       deliveryline.OutCartonQty1,
       deliveryline.ReturnCartonQty,
       deliveryline.Collator,
       deliveryline.StorageDays,
       deliveryline.Radix,
       deliveryline.OuterLength,
       deliveryline.OuterWidth,
       deliveryline.OuterHeight,
       deliveryline.ckzd,
       deliveryline.ckkd,
       deliveryline.ckgd,
       deliveryline.OuterGrossWeight,
       deliveryline.OuterNetWeight,
       deliveryline.ckmz,
       deliveryline.ckjz,
       deliveryline.PalletQty,
       deliveryline.syts,
       deliveryline.ExpectedCartonQty,
       deliveryline.OuterVolume,
       deliveryline.Volume,
       deliveryline.GrossWeight,
       deliveryline.cktj,
       deliveryline.ckztj1,
       deliveryline.ckzmz1,
       deliveryline.ckztj,
       deliveryline.tkztj,
       deliveryline.ckzmz,
       deliveryline.tkzmz,
       deliveryline.WarehousePosition,
       deliveryline.WarehousePosition1,

       deliveryline.SortNo,
       deliveryline.rid,
       deliveryline.pid,
       deliveryline.wyzd,
       deliveryline.gdry,
       deliveryline.Salesman,
       deliveryline.PurchasingAgent,
       deliveryline.CartonQty,
       deliveryline.Memo,
       deliveryline.ckxs1,
       deliveryline.kcxs,
       deliveryline.ccf,
       deliveryline.SNID,
       deliveryline.ContainerNo,
       deliveryline.SealNo,
       deliveryline.Exporter,
       deliveryline.SalesOrderNo,
       deliveryline.WarehouseName,
       deliveryline.Operator,
       deliveryline.rkdd,
       deliveryline.jcf,
       deliveryline.ywpath,
       deliveryline.cgpath,
       deliveryline.thyy,
       deliveryline.qckxs,
       deliveryline.qthxs,
       deliveryline.sd,
       deliveryline.gdbm,
       deliveryline.cgbm,
       deliveryline.ywbm
FROM delivery,deliveryline 
WHERE (delivery.sid=deliveryline.pid) 
  AND (delivery.ckdh=[仓库费用.出库单号]) 
ORDER BY deliveryline.ItemNo asc,deliveryline.PurchaseOrderNo asc

actions.expression:
SELECT cymxsheet.sid,
       cymxsheet.zwpm,
       cymxsheet.gcmc,
       cymxsheet.chsl,
       cymxsheet.jldw,
       cymxsheet.gcjg,
       cymxsheet.gczj,
       cymxsheet.wxrl,
       cymxsheet.chxs,
       cymxsheet.bzdw,
       cymxsheet.wxmz,
       cymxsheet.zmz,
       cymxsheet.wxjz,
       cymxsheet.zjz,
       cymxsheet.ztj,
       cymxsheet.wxht,
       cymxsheet.cpbh,
       cymxsheet.cght,
       cymxsheet.wxtj,
       cymxsheet.gdry,
       cymxsheet.zycpbh
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
WHERE (cymx.sid=cymxsheet.pid) 
  AND (cymx.fphm=:fh) 
  AND (cymxsheet.fpsb1="是") 
ORDER BY cymxsheet.cpbh asc,cymxsheet.cght asc

actions.name: 出库单
actions.caption: 出库单
actions.expression:
SELECT delivery.sid 
FROM delivery 
WHERE (delivery.ckdh=[仓库费用.出库单号]) 
ORDER BY delivery.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-费用合计
actions.caption: 计算-费用合计
actions.expression: [仓库费用.装柜费用]+[仓库费用.进仓费用]+[仓库费用.过 磅 费]+[仓库费用.运   费]+[仓库费用.其它费用]

actions.name: 计算-改单记录-箱数合计

actions.output: 仓库费用.改单记录.费用合计

view.params:
SELECT delivery.ckdh,delivery.SID FROM delivery 
WHERE  permission('出库单') 
ORDER BY delivery.SID ASC

SELECT delivery.ContainerNo
FROM delivery
WHERE    permission('出库单') 
ORDER BY delivery.ContainerNo ASC

SELECT wfgs.wfgs, wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="装柜业务")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE cyzglsheet.zm = '装柜财务' 
  AND cyzglsheet.bz LIKE CONCAT('%', [仓库费用.财务备注], '%')
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.xm ASC

SELECT sys_user.username
FROM  sys_user
WHERE   CONVERT(get_user_org(username, NULL) USING utf8mb4) like "%财务%"
